title: IR: Recognize a Broad O-H Band
bodyText: A broad, rounded absorption from roughly 3200 to 3600 cm^-1 is visible. Which functional group best explains it?

figures.description: Mock placeholder: normally this image would highlight a broad alcohol O-H band, alkyl C-H stretches, and a C-O band in the fingerprint region.

feedbacks: Correct: alcohol O-H absorptions are broad and usually appear around 3200-3600 cm^-1.
A nitrile would be a sharp band near 2250 cm^-1.
An alkene C=C stretch is much narrower and usually appears near 1640-1680 cm^-1.
Aromatic C-H bands are not broad in this region.
